flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Coalinga College rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($480 → $624).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Coalinga College fell 25% between 2009 and 2010 (12.2% → 9.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Coalinga College rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Coalinga College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.5% → 0.0%).
